case_title: ZISKING, KHAIM vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZISKING, KHAIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $6,552.30 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,552.30, EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
